category_sources: source_facts.description says Terragrunt is a thin wrapper for Terraform; official README describes Terragrunt as an OpenTofu/Terraform IaC orchestration tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is terragrunt; official repository README title is Terragrunt.
docs_sources: Official Terragrunt site and repository README point to Terragrunt documentation on terragrunt.gruntwork.io.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/gruntwork-io/terragrunt, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions Terraform; official README describes OpenTofu/Terraform IaC orchestration and CLI usage.
